data.title: Aesthetic Usability Effect
data.description: An intuitive interface is visually appealing and enhances user satisfaction.
data.technical_spec: Sleek design elements with a focus on ease of navigation and content discoverability.

data.title: Hick’s Law
data.description: Simplifying decision-making processes to reduce cognitive load on users.
data.technical_spec: Employing minimalism in UI design to streamline user’s choice path in browsing content.

data.title: Fitts’s Law
data.description: Designing interactive elements for easy access and efficient usability.
data.technical_spec: Larger clickable areas and responsive layouts to facilitate quick navigation.

data.title: Doherty Threshold
data.description: Creating interactions that ensure system responses occur within 400 ms for seamless experience.
data.technical_spec: Optimization techniques such as caching and prefetching to enhance interaction speed.

data.title: Zeigarnik Effect
data.description: Encouraging continuous user engagement by leveraging incomplete tasks (e.g., recommended shows).
data.technical_spec: Persistent recommendations and watchlist features to promote ongoing consumption.
